articles.title: Ex-Yankee Sonny Gray earns first victory against New York as member of Red Sox
articles.description:
Last winter, Gray said he didn’t enjoy playing for New York during his tenure in 2017 and ‘18.

The post Ex-Yankee Sonny Gray earns first victory against New York as member of Red Sox appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Sonny Gray secured his first win against the Yankees as a Red Sox pitcher.
Gray previously played for the Yankees in 2017 and 2018, expressing dissatisfaction.
His victory boosts Red Sox morale and strengthens rivalry with New York.

articles.title: Willson Contreras rides highs and lows of Red Sox win over Yankees
articles.description:
Within a three-inning span, Contreras hit a 2-run homer and also spiked a Gatorade cooler out of frustration in the Red Sox dugout.

The post Willson Contreras rides highs and lows of Red Sox win over Yankees appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Willson Contreras hit a 2-run homer in the Red Sox's win over the Yankees.
Contreras expressed frustration by spiking a Gatorade cooler during the game.
This victory boosts the Red Sox's morale as they compete in the AL East.

articles.title: Severe thunderstorms could hit Mass. Saturday evening, forecasters say
articles.description:

summary: Severe thunderstorms are forecasted for Saturday evening across Massachusetts.

Residents should prepare for possible power outages and travel disruptions.

articles.title: Nantasket Beach stayed quiet despite fears of a social media-fueled ‘takeover’
articles.description:

summary: Hull police increased staffing on Friday to prevent potential beach gatherings.

Local residents can feel reassured about safety at the beach this summer.

articles.title: A federal judge strikes down Trump administration immigration policy affecting 39 countries
articles.description:
The policies apply to U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services or USCIS, which approves applications for immigrants to work and become citizens.

The post A federal judge strikes down Trump administration immigration policy affecting 39 countries appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A federal judge invalidated immigration policies affecting 39 countries on June 5, 2026.
The ruling impacts U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services, affecting local immigrant applications.
Boston residents may see increased opportunities for immigrants to work and gain citizenship.

articles.title: Red Sox’ Payton Tolle talks ‘playing with joy’ for self, team: ‘I try to come with a smile every day’
articles.description:

summary: Red Sox player Payton Tolle emphasizes joy in gameplay for team morale.

His approach may improve fan engagement and support at Fenway Park.

articles.title: Trump’s deportation agenda is about to get a $70B infusion from Congress
articles.description:
The work of Congress comes at a pivotal time for the Republican president and his party as they face restless voters before the midterm elections.

The post Trump’s deportation agenda is about to get a $70B infusion from Congress appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Congress allocates $70 billion to support Trump's deportation agenda amid midterm election pressures.

Increased deportation efforts may heighten tensions and fears among immigrant populations in Boston.
